summary: Upgrading a card improves its effects or decreases its cost, adds a + to the end of its name, and turns its name  as well as the cost, if it was lowered as a result of Upgrading it. A card can only be upgraded once and all  and  cards cannot be upgraded.
wikitext: {{Sequel Disambiguation}} {{Under Construction}} {{Keyword Infobox|Upgrade|2}} '''Upgrading''' a card improves its effects or decreases its cost, adds a + to the end of its name, and turns its name {{TS|positive||green}} as well as the cost, if it was lowered as a result of '''Upgrading''' it. A card can only be '''upgraded''' once and all {{QueryLink|Cards|type:Status|Status}} and {{QueryLink|Cards|type:Curse|Curse}} cards cannot be '''upgraded'''. == Sources == === Permanently, outside of Combat === ==== Targeted Upgrades ==== The sources listed below allow you to choose which cards are upgraded, whether it is a singular card or multiple. * {{R|Neow's Talisman||2}} - Upon pickup, '''Upgrade''' 1 of your Strikes and 1 of your Defends. * {{R|Pomander||2}} - Upon pickup, '''Upgrade''' a card. * {{R|Yummy Cookie||2}} - Upon pickup, '''Upgrade''' 4 cards. * {{R|Astrolabe||2}} - Upon pickup, {{KW|Transform||2}} 3 cards, then '''Upgrade''' them. * {{E|Aroma of Chaos|2}} {{Frame|Maintain Control}} - '''Upgrade''' a card in your Deck. * {{E|Sapphire Seed|2}} {{Frame|Consume}} - '''Upgrade''' a card in your Deck. * {{E|The Trial|2}} {{Frame|DECIDE: Innocent}} - '''Upgrade''' 2 cards. ** Only shown if the ''Merchant Trial'' is selected. ==== Random Upgrades ==== * {{R|War Paint||2}} - Upon pickup, '''Upgrade''' 2 random {{QueryLink|Cards|type:Skill|Skills}}. * {{R|Whetstone||2}} - Upon pickup, '''Upgrade''' 2 random {{QueryLink|Cards|type:Attack|Attacks}}. * {{R|Sand Castle||2}} - Upon pickup, '''Upgrade''' 6 random cards. * {{R|War Hammer||2}} - Whenever you kill an [[Slay the Spire 2:Elites|Elite]], '''Upgrade''' 4 random cards. * {{R|Fragrant Mushroom||2}} - Upon pickup, lose 15 HP and '''Upgrade''' 3 random cards. * {{E|Doors of Light and Dark|2}} {{Frame|Light Door}} - '''Upgrade''' 2 random cards. * {{E|Tablet of Truth|2}} {{Frame|Decipher}} - '''Upgrade''' a random card. ** When choosing {{Frame|Decipher}} for the 5th time, ALL of your cards are '''Upgraded'''. * {{E|Reflections snoitcelfeR|2}} {{Frame|Touch a Mirror}} - Downgrade 2 random cards. '''Upgrade''' 4 random cards. ==== Sources of Upgraded Cards ==== The sources below will add a card to your Deck that has already been '''upgraded'''. * {{R|Frozen Egg||2}} - Whenever you add a {{QueryLink|Cards|type:Power|Power}} into your Deck, '''Upgrade''' it. * {{R|Molten Egg||2}} - Whenever you add a {{QueryLink|Cards|type:Attack|Attack}} into your Deck, '''Upgrade''' it. * {{R|Toxic Egg||2}} - Whenever you add a {{QueryLink|Cards|type:Skill|Skill}} into your Deck, '''Upgrade''' it. * {{R|Silver Crucible||2}} - The first 3 card rewards you see are '''Upgraded'''. * {{R|Pael's Tooth||2}} - Upon pickup, remove 5 cards from your Deck. After each combat, randomly add 1 back '''Upgraded'''. * {{R|Lava Lamp||2}} - At the end of combat, '''Upgrade''' all card rewards if you took no damage. === Temporary, in Combat === The sources listed below upgrade cards in combat. At the end of combat, all cards Upgraded by these sources will be Downgraded. * {{C|Armaments||2}} - '''Upgrade''' a card (ALL cards) in your Hand. * {{C|Aggression||2}} - At the start of your turn, put a random {{QueryLink|Cards|type:Attack|Attack}} from your Discard Pile into your Hand and '''Upgrade''' it. * {{C|Drain Power||2}} - '''Upgrade''' 2 random cards in your Discard Pile. * {{C|Apotheosis||2}} - '''Upgrade''' ALL your cards. * {{R|Stone Cracker||2}} - At the start of combat, '''Upgrade''' 2 random cards in your Draw Pile for the rest of combat. * {{R|Bellows||2}} - The first Hand you draw each combat is '''Upgraded'''. * {{R|Razor Tooth||2}} - Every time you play an {{QueryLink|Cards|type:Attack|Attack}} or {{QueryLink|Cards|type:Skill|Skill}}, '''Upgrade''' it for the remainder of combat. * {{R|Bone Tea||2}} - At the start of the next combat, '''Upgrade''' your starting hand. ==Downgrade== When an Upgraded card is Downgraded, it is reverted back to its base/unupgraded version. * {{E|Reflections snoitcelfeR|2}} {{Frame|Touch a Mirror}} - '''Downgrade''' 2 random cards. ** Only Upgraded cards are potential targets for this event effect, and the cards are Downgraded permanently. Downgraded cards can be upgraded again by normal methods. * {{BD|Dampen||2}} - While {{M|Magi Knight||2}} is alive, ALL your cards are '''Downgraded'''. ** While all cards are subject to {{BD|Dampen||2}}, Unupgraded cards are unaffected. Cards that were affect for the application of {{BD|Dampen||2}} will be reverted to their Upgraded form once the {{M|Magi Knight||2}} is killed.
